name: bad-pos
description: Office-visit packet carrying an invalid Place of Service code (88 is not on the bundled CMS POS list), so R-PA-013 (POS present + valid) fires as a block finding.

documents.name: pa-form.txt
documents.text:
PA Cover sheet
Prior Authorization Request Form
Patient: John A Smith
DOB: 1970-07-04
Member ID: A987654321
Date of service: 2026-05-01
Place of service: 88
Procedure 99214 office visit
Quantity: 1
Dx: E11.9 type 2 diabetes mellitus
Ordering provider NPI: 1234567893
TIN: 123456789
Signature: Pat Provider MD, 2026-05-01

documents.name: note.txt
documents.text:
Clinical note
Chief complaint: diabetes follow-up
Assessment and plan: continue metformin, 99214-level visit.
Medical necessity: required for glycemic control.
Note date: 2026-05-01
Signed: Pat Provider MD, 2026-05-01
